name: Glider Simulator
short_description: A glider simulator based on VR technology, with strong 360 degree immersion and 12 scenes including canyons and islands for flight. When you put on the VR device, you instantly become a free bird, flipping, hovering, and sprinting as you please, feeling the resonance of heartbeat and passion.
detailed_description:
A glider simulator based on VR technology, with strong 360 degree immersion and 12 scenes including canyons and islands for flight. If you want to change the material of the glider, you need to pass through a circular door to earn points for purchase.

When you put on your VR device, you instantly transform into a free bird, immersing yourself in the vast and boundless blue sky, freeing yourself from the constraints of the earth and soaring freely.

The gentle wind howls in your ears, and beneath you lies a dreamlike beauty. You can flip, hover, and sprint as you please, feeling the resonance of your heartbeat and passion.

Come and embark on this unique and enchanting flight journey, allowing your dreams to shine into reality in the VR world!

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean
